hero.badge: Free to play · No account needed · Works on any device
hero.headline: Play Poker, {br} {like_pro} {br} FREE.
hero.sub: Spin up a private table in seconds, share a link, and deal with your friends — wherever they are. No app downloads. No real money. Just the game.

lobby.add_bots: Add AI Bots to Table (Max 10 players total)
lobby.min_players_warning: Need at least 2 players to start the match
lobby.public_min_players_hint: Public tables start automatically with at least 2 players.
lobby.public_auto_start_hint: Match will start in a few seconds.

footer.disclaimer: YayPoker is a free social game. No real money changes hands on this platform. Virtual chips have no monetary value. Side arrangements between players are solely their responsibility.

tournament.cert_desc: This 4-digit code proves you were the winner of this tournament. Save it — no one else has it. You can verify it on the official page.
tournament.system_footer: YAY Poker · OFFICIAL CERTIFICATION SYSTEM · v1.0

how.label: How it works
how.headline: From zero to all-in{br}in under a minute.
how.step1_body: Hit the button, choose an alias — your private table is live. No forms, no passwords, no friction.
how.step2_body: Copy the room code and drop it on WhatsApp, Discord, or wherever your crew hangs out.
how.step3_body: Cards are dealt automatically. Chips are virtual. The trash talk is very much real.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything you need.{br}Nothing you don't.
features.money_body: YayPoker deals in virtual chips only. Want to make it interesting with a side bet between friends? That's your business. We just run the table.
features.setup_body: No install. No sign-up. Open the link and you're at the table.
features.private_body: Tables are invite-only. No strangers at your game.
features.responsive_body: Fully responsive — phone, tablet, laptop. Everyone at the table, wherever they are.

quote.text: "The best part of poker night was never the cards. It was the stories you told after."
quote.attribution: YayPoker — built for the moments between the hands

final_cta.label: Ready?
final_cta.headline: Start your table.{br}Deal the first hand.

about.headline: Poker for {span}
about.description: YayPoker is not just a game, it's the digital playground where you and your friends can prove who's the bluff king without risking the rent.
about.why_free_desc: Because poker is a sport of skill and laughs. We want the barrier to entry to be ZERO. We don't want your data, we don't want your cards, we just want you to deal the cards.
about.why_fast_desc: Because we hate 5-minute registrations. At YayPoker, the time between "I want to play" and being at the table is measured in blinks. Link, name, and All-in.

contact.headline: Get in {span}
contact.description: Have questions about YayPoker? Want to report a bug or suggest a feature for your family game nights? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.success_alert: Thank you for your message! This is a demo form.

not_found.headline: Yay! {span}
not_found.badge: You went All-In on a page that doesn't exist
not_found.description: Oops! It looks like this link is a bluff. But Yay, you can always go back to the main table!

privacy.headline: Privacy {span}
privacy.section1_content: At YayPoker, we believe that your business is your business. Our platform is designed from the ground up to be a safe, private, and "zero-data" environment for you to enjoy poker with your friends and family.
privacy.section2_content: We do not collect, store, or process any Personally Identifiable Information (PII).
section2_list: No Credit Card or Financial Information
privacy.section3_content: The only information we use is the Nickname you choose when joining a table. This nickname is transient and used only to identify you to other players at your specific table. We do not link this nickname to any real-world identity.
privacy.section4_content: YayPoker does not use tracking cookies, advertising beacons, or third-party analytics that profile your behavior across the web. We may use local storage only to remember your preferences (like your last used nickname) for your convenience.
privacy.section5_content: While YayPoker is a "play money" social game intended for friendly entertainment, we encourage parents to supervise their children's online activities. Since we collect no personal data, we do not knowingly profile or target children.
privacy.last_updated: Last updated: March 2026. This policy is designed to comply with the spirit of modern privacy laws (GDPR, CCPA) by simply not collecting the data they protect.

terms.headline: Terms of {span}
terms.section1_content_bold: YayPoker is NOT a gambling platform.
terms.section1_content: This website is for entertainment purposes only. No real money can be deposited, won, or lost on this platform. All chips used in the game are virtual and have NO monetary value.
terms.section2_content: YayPoker is built for "sano" (healthy) and family-friendly entertainment. It is designed to facilitate games between friends, family members, and established communities in a private setting.
terms.section3_content: You are responsible for the nickname you choose. While we do not collect your real identity, we expect all players to maintain a respectful and family-friendly environment. We reserve the right to terminate any game session that violates the spirit of "sano" play.
terms.section4_content: This service is provided "as is" and "as available" without any warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for any connection issues, loss of virtual chips, or interruptions in gameplay.
terms.section5_content: Any side arrangements or bets made between players outside of the virtual chip system of YayPoker are strictly between those individuals. YayPoker does not endorse, facilitate, or take responsibility for any external agreements.
terms.footer: By using YayPoker, you agree to these terms and acknowledge that this is a social, play-money game intended for entertainment with friends and family.

verify.headline: VERIFIER
verify.sub: Enter the tournament ID and the 4-digit code to confirm the winner's identity
verify.valid_msg: This code has been successfully verified. The player is the official winner of this tournament.
verify.footer: OFFICIAL CERTIFICATION SYSTEM · YAY POKER v1.0
